title: NHKマイルCの後に・遠い光

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Look at me! I made it through the NHK Mile Cup! My all-or-nothing effort took me to the tear-jerking light on the other side. Yes, it was that sublime...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When I come to, I see both Opera O and Doto!
You mean they actually came to check on me?!
Apparently, they're both planning to run in the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be the event of a lifetime! But Opera
O's invitation also comes with a request—she
wants to see how I perform on dirt. Looks like I'll
have to put on a good show!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Will the radiance I saw on the turf today be the
same on dirt? I'll find out in my next race—the
Japan Dirt Derby!
